messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-608 — Persist bounce history (count + reason) on the ticket's own YAML record, so 'how many times did this bounce, and why' is answerable from the ticket alone
Approval context: Two calls the intake explicitly left to the specifier, resolved as recommendations — confirm or redirect before this is promoted.
(a) FIELD SHAPE. Recommendation: BOTH a `bounce_count:` integer and a `bounce_history:` list of one-line flow-mapping entries, rather than the simpler `bounce_count:` + …
BL-608 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-608" (or "reject BL-608 <reason>") to act.
